    Adds this additional metadata to the all built Documents.

    Adds this additional metadata to the all built Documents.
    MarkdownDocumentReaderConfig.Builder

    Text divided by horizontal lines will create new Documents.
    MarkdownDocumentReaderConfig.Builder

    Whatever to include blockquotes in Documents.
